name: Prima Meat Packers, Ltd.
summary: Prima Meat Packers, Ltd. manufactures and sells hams and sausages, fresh meats, processed foods, and other products in Japan. It is involved in the retailing of meat cuts, delicatessens processed foods, etc.; and live hog operation and slaughtering fabrication businesses, as well as meat distribution business. The company also operates convenience stores. Prima Meat Packers, Ltd. was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
